---
title: "Giovanna Moura"
format: html
---

# About Me

I am a Data Science student at BYU-Idaho with an interest in cybersecurity and machine learning. I enjoy solving problems using data and building practical projects.

# Skills
- Python
- SQL
- Data Visualization
- Machine Learning

# Projects
- Data analysis reports using Polars
- Machine learning models for prediction
- Visualization dashboards

# Experience
- BYU-Idaho Data Science Student

# Contact
- Email: your@email.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/yourusername
